title: Kimari Preference Dataset Entry
description: Schema for Preference (chosen/rejected) training data entries in JSONL format. Used for DPO/ORPO preference tuning. Each line in a preference dataset file must be a valid JSON object conforming to this schema.

prompt.description: The input prompt or question presented to the model.

chosen.description: The preferred/higher-quality response. Must be demonstrably better than the rejected response.

rejected.description: The less-preferred/lower-quality response. Must be meaningfully different from the chosen response.

source.description: Origin of this data point. Must be a traceable, descriptive source identifier — not 'unknown'.

license.description: License under which this data is shared. Must be a valid SPDX identifier or well-known license name — not 'unknown'.

tags.description: Categorization tags for filtering and organization. Use lowercase, hyphenated format.
